items.reason: Retired from the mix catalog because period-comparison owns the active horizontal waterfall source output for before/after movement.
Retired from the mix catalog because period-comparison owns the active horizontal waterfall small-multiple source output.
The generic stacked-bar renderer is exposed as a concrete chart capability; cohort chart variants use the legacy stacked-column grammar.
The legacy plotOverlayChart path is exposed separately from plain stacked-bar composition.

The legacy stacked-column renderer is exposed through concrete total-column, stacked-column, like-for-like, and since/lost cohort column capabilities. The stacked-column overlay variant is retired because stacked composition cannot carry a related metric overlay.
